creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
On which ports version you build?
Use it least this one:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=4671249405c05bb65dfec261eb645081ea72fdf5

I recommend to use a current version from today which uses 15.1.2 that fixes some critical security issues:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=61e677748877875d05008c1a76111e6fef95c39f

This version definitely builds fine.
If it does not for, I recommend to try building your packages with poudriere, portmaster does not build in a clean environment which can trigger serious issues which are caused by the way portmaster works.
